expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: Tavily-first then Confluence fallback ordering
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly covers the case focus in multiple places, e.g., in Scope: "Case focus (blocking): Tavily-first then Confluence fallback ordering" and in the Pass/Fail table: "PASS (contract explicitly states requirement)" with described contract note: "written research artifacts must explicitly record Tavily-first ordering, and any Confluence usage must be framed as fallback-only with a recorded insufficiency reason."

expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase3
